body_txt: A caveman in a modern-day setting . He's usally either an unfrozen Human Popsicle or someone who got here through Time Travel . If he's capable of speech, expect Hulk Speak ; if not, grunting is the way to go. Occasionally, this is subverted by having the caveman speak in interesting prose, usually with an upper-class English accent. If they are able to fit in, then it is Like a Duck Takes to Water (which was previously known as "Unfrozen Caveman Lawyer", thanks to the SNL example below). Note that the redirect title, "Freezetta Man", is a play on Frazetta Man , which is a certain type of caveman. Compare Wild Man .
